data.title: What's Going On With Windtree Therapeutics Shares Thursday?
data.description: Windtree shares are trading higher on Thursday after the company entered a license and supply agreement with Evofem.

data.title: Joby, Archer Navigate eVTOL Uncertainty As FAA Delays, Market Shifts Persist
data.description: Analyst predicts longer, rockier road to commercialization for eVTOLs due to FAA delays & regulatory hurdles. Market shrinks but defense offers potential.

data.title: Dow Gains Over 100 Points; Accenture Shares Plunge After Q2 Results
H World Posts Q4 Revenue Beat, Projects 6% Revenue Growth For 2025
data.description: H World Group Limited shares are trading higher on Thursday after the company reported fourth-quarter results.

data.title: Darden Restaurants Expands Uber Delivery Option To Cheddar's Following Successful Rollout At Olive Garden
data.description: Darden Restaurants Inc (NYSE:DRI) provided a positive update on its partnership with Uber Technologies Inc (NYSE:UBER) on Thursday. The company plans to expand its delivery offering following a successful rollout.
